text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Trainer! How was my time? I feel like I did
pretty well!
choice_data_list: Why don't you take a little break?
Why don't you take a little break?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Huh? I don't need a break. I've got plenty of gas
left!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Trainer... You said I look cool when I run.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
But I bet I can be even faster—and even
cooler—than I am now.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: I wanna show you the best race I've got in me!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: So c'mon! Lemme train a little longer.
choice_data_list: All right! Let's keep going then!
All right! Let's keep going then!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Heheh. I knew you'd come around!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I'm not so good at sayin' it, but I really do
appreciate you.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Aughhh! It sounds so lame, sayin' it out loud!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Know what, forget all that! I said nothing, got it?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, I'm gonna do one more lap! Make sure
you time me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Though she rarely admits it to my face, Vodka
seems to trust me a lot.
